title: Melonium
description:
A mod, originally created for a private smp,
now made public, because, I don't really know
body:
**Melonium**
> A minecraft mod originally created for a private smp, that I now decided to make public
so anyone can use it.
It adds three new ores:
# Melonium
- A ore found in the overworld.
- It's useless (at least for now)
## Alladinium
- Found in the end
- Named after my old cat Alladdin
- Can be used to craft armor, that will give you night vision
### Obsibium
- found in the nether
- Can be used to craft tools, weapons and armor
- Armor hides your nametag
